programme.title: Patience
programme.desc: A music student is found dead; when her professor dies suddenly, Patience races to unravel the mystery which leads to a showdown in York Minster that exposes the unlikely killer.

programme.title: Grantchester on Masterpiece
programme.desc: Rivalry turns deadly when a Cambridge student is murdered and Alphy's Bible is found at the scene; Geordie faces a pivotal decision.

programme.title: Downton Abbey on Masterpiece
programme.desc: Downton has been turned into a convalescent home for wounded officers, and there is a lot to do; the arrival of the first patients has everyone scurrying.

programme.title: American Experience
programme.desc: President George H.W. Bush's childhood, early career in Texas and rise in the Republican Party.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots With Henry Louis Gates, Jr.
programme.desc: Rapper Wiz Khalifa and actor Sanaa Lathan learn about ancestors who left the American South in search of better lives in the North.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Rattles learns how to adjust to life in a blended family when his mom dates Archie Vanderloo; Arthur offers to babysit.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: The villains break into Odd Squad headquarters; the agents pursue an odd creature.

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: Aviva vows to build a ground racer that runs faster than a cheetah.

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: A foggy Halloween almost derails Corky and Lily's trick-or-treating.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop

programme.desc: Everett faces his fear of water by taking a swimming lesson; Lyla doesn't want Miss Emmaline to move.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.sub-title: The Potato Collection; Nico and the Nutty Buddies
programme.desc: Carl thinks his potato display is the best idea to show his school spirit; Nico tries to join the Junior Nutty Buddy Nut Lovers' Club.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Jodi's Lemonade Stand; Daniel Remembers What He Needs
programme.desc: Daniel and his friends set up a lemonade stand; Daniel repeats his checklist out loud so he remembers everything he needs for school.

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.desc: Phoebe and Jay set a new record for the longest paper airplane fight; Phoebe and Jay learn how to build a stable pillow fort.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Elmo, Abby and Julia build a mini city while Grover helps Cookie Monster serve ice cream.

programme.title: Work It Out Wombats!

programme.desc: Zeke volunteers to help Mr. E for the day; the Wombats are excited to race in the Treeborhood Derby.

programme.sub-title: A Donkey Dilemma; The Quiet Game
programme.desc: Donkey promises to help bathe Gregory and to also play Bubble Bonanza with Panda; the pals make up a quiet game so they don't disturb Rock Star Penguin while he tries to write a song.

programme.sub-title: Rosie in the City; Rosie in the Country
programme.desc: Rosie, Javi and Papa go on an adventure when Javi's dragon gets lost in the city; Rosie looks for blue bonnets in the country.

programme.title: Gaither Gospel Hour
programme.desc: Taped live at the historic Ryman Auditorium, The Mother Church Of Country Music, in Nashville, Tennessee, Alan Jackson delivers a powerful performance featuring songs from his very personal release Precious Memories.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, a Christian minister, discusses religious teachings and encourages people to live ethically.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Learning to depend on God.

programme.title: A Life Redeemed: The Nicky Cruz Story
programme.desc: From feared gang warlord to global evangelist, Nicky Cruz shares his powerful testimony of violence, redemption, and relentless love. Discover how an encounter with Jesus transformed his life and launched a mission to reach at-risk youth.

programme.title: Worship With The Binions and Friends
programme.sub-title: Greg & Janna Long & Jonathan Nelson Part 2
programme.desc: David and Nicole Binion host dynamic nights of worship with live music from top gospel artists.

programme.title: Jesus: The Game Changer
programme.desc: Karl Faase travels to the U.K., U.S., Singapore, India and Australia, interviewing authors, academics and modern-day game changers about how the life and teaching of Jesus changed the world and why it matters.

programme.title: Stop the Pain: The Six to Fix
programme.desc: Dr. Scott Hannen shares how to unlock the body's potential to heal itself.

programme.title: Why Israel Matters
programme.desc: In spite of impossible odds, the Jewish people survive and thrive; for thousands of years, the Jewish tradition has endured; that tradition inspires perseverance, sustaining Israel even into the modern era.

programme.title: Praise
programme.desc: Sheila Walsh hosts Joni Eareckson Tada.

programme.title: Hagee Ministries
programme.desc: The mission of John Hagee Ministries is to take the Gospel to all the world and to all generations.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: How God lavishes his goodness on his children.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, a Christian minister, discusses religious teachings and encourages people to live ethically.

programme.title: Steven Furtick
programme.desc: From Elevation Church in Charlotte, N.C., Pastor Steven Furtick offers inspirational messages through his sermons.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.sub-title: Hope for Life's Dark Moments and Tough Seasons
programme.desc: Find hope even in your darkest days and toughest seasons through this encouraging program with Joseph.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.sub-title: How Should We Now Live? Part 2
programme.desc: The teaching ministry of American Southern Baptist pastor and television host, Robert Jeffress; he is a senior minister of the First Baptist Church in Dallas as well as a Fox News contributor.

programme.title: Life Today
programme.desc: "The Biblio Diet" author shares his revelation of the healing power of common leaves growing in every part of the earth.

programme.title: The Supernatural Now
programme.desc: Apostle Guillermo Maldonado is the Sr. Pastor and founder of King Jesus International Ministry (Ministerio Internacional El Rey Jesus), considered one of the fastest growing multicultural churches in the United States.

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Is the Torah still relevant today? We learn how the Law guides us to love God in everyday life and live as His holy people.

programme.title: Ron Carpenter
programme.sub-title: When No One Is Watching Part 5
programme.desc: Ron Carpenter leads the Body of Christ to a new level and reaches out to the lost and hurting.

programme.title: Andrew Wommack: Gospel Truth
programme.desc: Andrew shares life-changing lessons we can learn from the life of David and how God looks at the heart of men.

programme.title: Better Together
programme.desc: Sheila Walsh, Jamie Ivey, Toni Collier, Emily Vogeltanz, and Lisa Whittle on how God heals the broken, and redeems life's trials.

programme.title: Grace for Today
programme.desc: Pastor Lawson Perdue from the Charis Christian Center outreach speaks to viewers across the globe about the practical message of Jesus Christ; he helps believers discover the evangelical gifts and talents that they have to offer to his grace.

programme.title: Faith Is the Victory
programme.desc: Mark and Trina Hankins share messages about faith, helping believers understand their identity in Christ and the Holy Spirit's role in their lives.

programme.title: Allen Jackson Ministries
programme.desc: What's the best way to prepare for the uncertain future? Trust God with our resources! Pastor Allen Jackson talks about biblical principles surrounding the money, resources, and possessions.

programme.desc: How God lavishes his goodness on his children.
